_comment: Insert after sN-council-fixes. Read-only re-verification — agent-runner pushes to GitHub when this council signs off.
title: Live Council — Sprint N remediation verification
doneWhen: docs/council/sprint-N-verify-report.md exists; High/Medium findings verified fixed or deferred; council signs off for publish
dontTouch: application code — report only unless blocker found
notes: Git publish trigger — one push per sprint after full council remediation cycle.

members.focus: Re-check auth, RBAC, injection, secrets after remediation.
Confirm fixes match conventions; no scope creep.

synthesizer.focus: Sign off Sprint N for GitHub publish or list remaining blockers.
